property.name: enable.external.atlas.for.spark
property.description: Enable Spark Atlas hook even when Atlas service is not installed in the cluster.

property.name: atlas.jaas.ticketBased-KafkaClient.loginModuleControlFlag
property.description: JAAS control flag for ticket-based Kafka client (in-memory JAAS).

property.name: atlas.jaas.ticketBased-KafkaClient.loginModuleName
property.description: JAAS login module for ticket-based Kafka client (in-memory JAAS).

property.name: atlas.jaas.ticketBased-KafkaClient.option.useTicketCache
property.description: Use Kerberos ticket cache for Spark Atlas hook Kafka authentication.

property.name: atlas.kafka.enable.idempotence
property.description: Disable Kafka idempotence for Spark Atlas hook producers unless the Kafka Ranger cluster ACL grants idempotent_write.
